description_short: Deep-dive TCP/UDP flow analysis with protocol reconstruction.
description_long: Analyzes network flows in the loaded PcapSession with protocol-aware reconstruction. Aggregates bidirectional flows between host pairs, computes byte ratios, identifies long-duration connections, and provides per-protocol breakdowns for DNS, HTTP, and TLS. Designed for detailed forensic examination of specific conversations flagged by summary or threat hunt tools.
author: Event Mill Contributors
